name: EMERGENCY AIGOV istio proxy control plane issue
query: logs("service:dockerfiles_istio-proxyv2 transport Error lookup istio-system.svc on no such host").index("*").rollup("count").last("5m") > 1
message:
Attention: @mcaas-support@gsa.gov

This alert is seeing logs like "error: desc = "transport: Error while dialing: dial tcp: lookup istiod-*.istio-system.svc on *: no such host"

Please identify the pod(s) with istio side cars which are throwing this error and restart them immediately.

If Istio was recently updated the following command should have been run - however there are cases where it does not restart the necessary pods, so you may still need to identify and restart a pod manually.

    python3 main.py {env} roll-for-istio

options.escalation_message:
@mcaas-support@gsa.gov

Seriously - go and restart the pods with side cars right now please.
